title: JoJo Siwa Brush Buddies Kids Toothbrush Ultra Soft Bristles with Plastic Cap
description:
If your child is a JoJo Siwa fan, they’ll love brushing with the JoJo Siwa Brush Buddies Kids Toothbrush with Ultra Soft Bristles! The JoJo Siwa kids toothbrush features ultra soft bristles to protect your little one’s tooth enamel and gums, but is still effective for reaching those hard to reach places. The JoJo Siwa themed tooth brush with ultra soft bristles is ergonomically designed and easy to use for little hands so they can practice teeth cleaning it all by themselves! The toothbrush also comes with a cute JoJo Siwa plastic cap to keep out dust from the top of the toothbrush; this also helps your little ones to start to understand good hygiene habits in the bathroom

JoJo Siwa Brush Buddies Kids Toothbrush Ultra Soft Bristles with Plastic Cap

If your child is a JoJo Siwa fan, they’ll love brushing with the JoJo Siwa Brush Buddies Kids Toothbrush with Ultra Soft Bristles!

The JoJo Siwa kids toothbrush features ultra soft bristles to protect your little one’s tooth enamel and gums, but is still effective for reaching those hard to reach places. The JoJo Siwa themed tooth brush with ultra soft bristles is ergonomically designed and easy to use for little hands so they can practice teeth cleaning it all by themselves!

Key Features

  • JOJO SIWA TOOTHBRUSH: If your child is a JoJo Siwa fan, they’ll love brushing their teeth with the JoJo Siwa Brush Buddies Kids Toothbrush with Ultra Soft Bristles; this kids toothbrush is gentle enough on your little one’s tooth enamel and gums for regular brushing
  • KID FRIENDLY DESIGN: The JoJo Siwa themed kids toothbrush with ultra soft bristles is ergonomically designed and easy to use for little hands, so they can practice teeth cleaning all on their own
  • JOJO SIWA TOOTHBRUSH CAP: This JoJo Siwa kids toothbrush also comes with a fun and cute JoJo Siwa cap to keep dust off the top of the toothbrush; this also helps your little ones to start to understand good hygiene habits in the bathroom
  • KIDS TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH: This is the perfect kids toothbrush to take with you on a family vacation, camping trip, outdoor school adventures or if you’re sending your kids away for camp! Lightweight but durable, the convenient toothbrush cap snaps on to keep their toothbrush clean until they’re ready for their next brush
  • PLEASE NOTE - There are 4 different styles of this brush, and styles ship out at random.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BBJOJOBCAP4STY
  • UPC: 852064006265
  • Color: Pink

The toothbrush also comes with a cute JoJo Siwa plastic cap to keep out dust from the top of the toothbrush; this also helps your little ones to start to understand good hygiene habits in the bathroom. Lastly, this is the perfect kids toothbrush to take with you on a family vacation, camping trip, outdoor school adventures or if you’re sending your kids away for camp! Lightweight but durable, the convenient toothbrush cap snaps on to keep their toothbrush clean until they’re ready for their next brush.

Add some fun to your child’s morning and nightly routines with the JoJo Siwa Brush Buddies Kids Childrens Soft Bristle Toothbrush! Children should brush for approximately two minutes with their favorite toothpaste and cover with toothbrush cap when they are done.

PLEASE NOTE - STYLES SHIP AT RANDOM
